name: remove_cells_from_pblock
full_help:
remove_cells_from_pblock

Description: 
Remove cells from a Pblock

Syntax: 
remove_cells_from_pblock  [-quiet] [-verbose] <pblock> <cells>...

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <pblock>    Pblock to remove cells from
  <cells>     Cells to remove

Categories: 
Floorplan, XDC

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
